user_query: I'm starting a new business and I need to find potential clients. Can you help me search for companies based on specific criteria, such as location and industry? Additionally, provide me with the contact details of the companies so that I can reach out to them.

TaskList.description: Determine the specific criteria for searching potential clients, such as desired location and industry.
Search for companies based on the specified criteria (location and industry).
Retrieve the contact details of the companies found during the search.
